# Polarization

Polarization is a central domain for projects about shared identity, public health, political conflict, and cooperation.

## Current focus

- Affective polarization
- Cross-partisan perception
- Shared identity interventions
- Public health and cooperation
- Self-control and prejudice regulation
- Wise interventions and social norms

## Links to projects

- [Polarization interventions](../projects/polarization-interventions.qmd)
- [AI simulations](../projects/ai-simulations.qmd)
